refundPolicyText:
Last updated: April 22, 2026

Since TikTok Gen provides digital services with instant access, we adhere to the following refund policy:

## 1. Digital Nature of Services
Once a PRO code is activated, the service is considered provided. Refunds are NOT possible if:
• The activation code has already been used.
• You have spent at least 1 credit on AI text, voice, or avatar generation.
• You have downloaded materials from the media library.

## 2. Exceptions
You can request a refund within 24 hours of payment ONLY if:
• You have NOT activated the code in the system.
• A technical error occurred preventing code activation, and our support cannot fix it.

## 3. Procedure
To request a refund, contact us at youworkday@gmail.com
termsPolicyText:
Last updated: April 22, 2026

By using TikTok Gen ("Service"), you agree to these Terms.

## 1. Service Description
TikTok Gen is a design tool that allows creating visual comment mockups and downloading media materials (backgrounds) for content creation. The Service is intended for entertainment, parody, and educational purposes.

## 2. Affiliation Disclaimer
We are NOT affiliated, sponsored, or endorsed by TikTok, ByteDance Ltd, or any other social platforms. All graphic elements resembling social media interfaces are part of the design template only.

## 3. User Responsibility
You are solely responsible for how you use the generated images and videos. It is strictly forbidden to use the Service for:
• Blackmail or intimidation.
• Spreading misinformation (fake news).
• Infringing on third-party copyrights.
You agree to hold TikTok Gen harmless from any claims related to your content.

## 4. Paid Services
PRO access provides advanced features for a specific period. You confirm that you are 18 years old (or have parental permission) to make a payment.

## 5. Restrictions
We reserve the right to cancel access without a refund in case of hacking attempts or illegal use of the Service.
privacyPolicyText:
Last updated: April 22, 2026

We value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data.

## 1. Data We Collect
• Email: Only for PRO code delivery via Stripe.
• Technical data: LocalStorage files are used to save your language and active PRO code on your device.

## 2. AI Data Processing
When you generate a comment or voice, your text is transmitted to third-party providers (Gemini API, ElevenLabs) via an encrypted connection. We do NOT store the content of your generations in our database after the process is complete.

## 3. Payments
All payments are processed by Stripe. We do not have access to your bank card details.

## 4. Cookies and LocalStorage
We do not use advertising trackers. We only use technical records in your browser to ensure PRO access works.
gdprPolicyText:
## GDPR Compliance (For EU Users)
If you are located in the European Economic Area (EEA), you have certain rights under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).

## Legal Basis for Processing
We process your data based on:
• Your consent (e.g., cookies, analytics)
• Contractual necessity (e.g., providing paid services)
• Legitimate interests (e.g., service improvement, abuse prevention)

## Your Rights
You have the right to:
• Access your personal data
• Request correction of inaccurate data
• Request deletion of your data ("right to be forgotten")
• Restrict or object to processing
• Request data portability
• Withdraw consent at any time

## Data Retention
We keep personal data only as long as necessary to provide our services or comply with legal obligations.

## Data Transfer
Your data may be processed outside the EEA (e.g., by third-party payment services). In such cases, we ensure appropriate safeguards are in place.

## Contacts and Inquiries
To exercise your rights, contact us: support@tt-comments.online
We will respond within 30 days, as required by GDPR.
faqText:
## Is this service official?
No. TikTok Gen is an independent tool for creators. We are not associated with the official TikTok app.

## What do I get with PRO access?
You get full access to the comment generator (AI texts, ElevenLabs voices, avatars without watermarks) and access to the entire library of backgrounds. The code is valid for 7 days or 300 generations.

## Are my comments stored on the server?
No. All generations happen "on the fly". Once you close the tab, the data (if not downloaded) disappears. We care about your privacy.

## Can I use backgrounds for commercial purposes?
Yes, you can use downloaded backgrounds for your videos, but remember the community rules of the platforms where you upload content.

## Why did my code stop working?
Access ends if the validity period (7 days) expired or you used up the limit of 300 generations. You can always check the balance at the top of the toolbar.
